description:
A material, component, or finished good.

Items are master data — they describe WHAT something is, not
WHERE it is (that's inventory) or HOW MUCH exists (that's lot
quantity).

source_system.description: Adapter or system that produced this record (e.g. 'whk-wms').
source_system.title: Source System

source_id.description: Primary key of this entity in the source system.
source_id.title: Source Id

captured_at.description: UTC timestamp when this snapshot was captured by Forge.
captured_at.title: Captured At

metadata.description: Source-system-specific fields that don't map to core schema.
metadata.title: Metadata

unit_of_measure.description: Default unit of measure for this item.
unit_of_measure.title: Unit Of Measure

vendor_id.description: Reference to primary vendor BusinessEntity (by source_id).
vendor_id.title: Vendor Id

is_active.description: Whether this item is currently active in the system.
is_active.title: Is Active

title: MaterialItem
